codeReview.summary: Content extraction for Lectures 3 and 4 is complete and correct. All required instructions are present with proper syntax-highlighted examples, tables, and provenance metadata. Build succeeded and validate:content passed 611 assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported frontend-worker skill didn't exist and proceeded manually, but the skill file exists at .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md. The worker may have looked in the wrong location, or the skill was added after this worker ran. The skill content focuses on UI/component changes rather than content extraction, which may explain why it wasn't deemed appropriate for this task.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false, deviations: 'frontend-worker skill didn't exist'. But .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md exists with content about adding theme toggle, removing nav items, redirecting routes - none of which apply to content extraction.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the pattern of creating duplicate files in both data/processed/ and src/data/processed/ for lectures.json, continuing a known issue first flagged in extract-lecture-1-2 review. The same duplication pattern exists for course-map.json (noted in phase2 scrutiny reviews).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Git diff shows 4 files changed: data/processed/lectures.json, src/data/processed/lectures.json, data/processed/course-map.json, src/data/processed/course-map.json. Prior review extract-lecture-1-2.json noted: 'There are duplicate lectures.json files in data/processed/ and src/data/processed/'

sharedStateObservations.observation: No schema validation added for the new lectures.json content. Prior phase2 reviews (e.g., example-explorer) noted that 'src/data/processed/*.json files lack schema validation'. This remains unaddressed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No new schema validation files created. AGENTS.md Engineering Rules mentions 'Add schema validation for processed content' but no JSON schema files exist in data/processed/.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. Lecture 3 covers LEA, XCHG, PUSH, POP, IN, OUT with 5 sections. Lecture 4 covers ADD, SUB, INC, DEC, NEG, CMP, MUL, DIV, CBW, CWD, and flags register with 6 sections. All content has proper provenance metadata, syntax highlighting, and follows established lecture format. Build succeeded, validation passed 611 assertions. Two non-blocking observations: (1) frontend-worker skill discrepancy - worker thought skill didn't exist but it does exist, (2) duplicate data file pattern continues from prior reviews.
